We have model VS-65, a 6 x 5 ft vertical resin shed.
Material is PP resin and the floor is included.

MOQ is 10 sets.
The price is USD 295 per set for 10 sets.
Production lead time is about 30 days.
We can provide an English manual and neutral packaging.

Please let us know your order plan.
